source_description: Reproduce, verify, and fix the concrete Windows-related issues from the prior scan (commit 51c7cd0b); normalize Windows auth storage away from Credential Manager (closes #603); unify Windows runtime state under %LOCALAPPDATA%\spec-kitty\; harden the git pre-commit hook generator; correct user-facing path messaging on Windows; revalidate worktree + symlink behavior; and add a native windows-latest CI job running a curated Windows-critical suite. Then run a second-pass repo-wide audit for residual Unix-only assumptions.
